entry.title: New: RES26-041 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT FOR REGISTRATION AND TRAVEL EXPENSES, VALUED AT $3,500, TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR A STAFF MEMBER OF THE HONOLULU ZOO TO PARTICIPATE IN THE ASSOCIATION OF ZOOS AND AQUARIUMS (AZA) SPECIES SURVIVAL PLAN PROGRAM ON LABUAN BAJO ISLAND, INDONESIA, FROM APRIL 3-15, 2026.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
